name: Moon Hutcherson (PJO OC)
description: Moon, Daughter of Artemis— They/She was born without her mother having it with a father, instead she somewhat had Moon like Athena had her children. She has beautiful brunette hair braided down until her knees, sharp sliver eyes like Artemis's, plae skin covered with battle scars, she wears a deer skull as a mask to cover her identity. Moon wears a comfy (or gray) zipped up sweater, something slimar that Artemis wore. Also dresses up normally in black leggings while in cold weather—She doesn't wear shoes, instead like gray leg warmers that cover her ankles and heels. A mark on her arm that was naturally gave by her mother. Moon has night vision that allows her to see in even the darkest night. Moon has the ability to temporarily shift anyone into a jackalope for a day. Like their grandfather, she possess minor Atmokinesis and are partially immune to lightning. She can also redirect or reflect lightning back at the sender but she cannot completely control the bolt's path. She can summon the animal within her which allows her to fight like an animal. And depending on the animal she's fighting like she have an increase in strength,speed, agility, endurance, and stamina.
creator: SugerLegend
